description: SPIN Benchmark Suite — comprehensive evaluation of deterministic German language analysis

components.name: Grammar Rule Detection
components.description: Tests GR_RULES against annotated German text — precision, recall, and F1.

components.name: Clause Structure Analysis
components.description: Tests clause detection accuracy across sentence topology types.

components.name: Phonotactic Validation
components.description: Tests phonotactic constraint checker against known violations and clean text.

components.name: Determinism Replay
components.description: Verifies identical outputs on identical inputs across runs.

components.name: Efficiency Metrics
components.description: Measures throughput, memory usage, and processing time.

components.name: Slice Report
components.description: Performance breakdown across error categories, input lengths, and difficulty levels.
